Article Text:
Spectators during the Indian Super League (ISL) 2026 football match between East Bengal vs Inter Kashi (PTI Photo/Swapan Mahapatra)

KOLKATA: Pointing towards the entrance gate of the beautifully decorated East Bengal club tent, a middle-aged man donning a red shirt nostalgically told his teenage son how it was made of wood, and how a similar flow of the multitude had converged at the same place 22 years ago.Much water has flowed down the Hooghly since that National Football League title in 2001, from the city changing its name from Calcutta to Kolkata to the political landscape changing colours twice in the state.Yet, something remains unaltered as the story continues and passes from a father to his son, a story of love for the team, a story of shared delight and despair. The story of a legacy, through all its ups and downs. As thousands of the red-and-gold faithful joined the likes of Anwar Ali, Prabhsukhan Gill and Anton Sojberg at the club tent on Friday, just hours after winning their maiden ISL title and ending their 22-year-long hurt of missing out on a national league, the son, who was not even born in 2001, said, “Yes, it’s beautiful. ”“This club represents a story of father to son, son to grandson. This is a legacy club. Thousands and thousands of people are breathing, sweating and living the East Bengal life.How I love this club,” said the team’s coach Oscar Bruzon, the man behind the team’s ‘Mission ISL’. By winning the ISL, East Bengal became the first Indian team to play in Asian football both in men and women’s categories in a single season.The new ISL champions will feature in the playoffs for the AFC Challenge League. It was at the same stage in Asian football 19 months ago when Bruzon took the side to Bhutan and successfully crossed the playoff hurdle in the third tier of Asian’s club competition. “Our winning mentality came from that tournament,” Bruzon told TOI .
Article Summary: East Bengal won their maiden Indian Super League (ISL) title on Friday. The Kolkata-based side became the first Indian team to play in Asian football both in men and women’s categories in a single season. The new ISL champions will feature in the playoffs for the AFC Challenge League.

Article Title: UEFA Women’s Champions League: Lyon defend legacy in clash with dynasty-seeking Barcelona
Article Text:
Olympique Lyonnais players during a training session in Oslo (AFP Photo)

(Fans can watch UWCL final on FanCode at 9:30pm)

It will be the third sequel to the iconic clash between two giants of Europe when Barcelona and Olympique Lyonnais face off in the UEFA Women’s Champions League final in Oslo on Saturday.While it will be the sixth consecutive Champions League final for the Spanish champions, who will be eager to avenge their defeat to Arsenal last time, the French heavyweights will look to add their ninth European crown, having already ended Arsenal’s title defence in a second-leg comeback win in the semifinal.As big as this game is in its scope, there are sub plots that make the clash at the Ullevaal Stadion more electrifying.A crucial one of those is the fact that Spanish coach Jonatan Giráldez will be on the sidelines for Lyonnais this time, having managed the Catalans to their last Champions League title when the two teams had last met in the final of the competition.“I’m really happy to have been fortunate enough to lead this marvellous group of players. Now, two years down the line I’ve got a chance to face them. Obviously, it’ll be a challenge and I’m aware of the difficulties that comes with facing them,” Giráldez said during an UEFA interaction.“Then there’s the nostalgia factor – the nostalgia of what I experienced at Barcelona.”He spent six years with the Barcelona women’s team till 2024 and joined the French club last year, with former assistant Pere Romeu now in charge at the Spanish club.With Aitana Bonmatí returning fully fit at a crucial stage and Ewa Pajor arriving in Norway as the tournament’s joint-top scorer, Giráldez is aware of Barcelona’s high pressing game, ability to find spaces and width in attack and collective ambition to win a fourth Champions League.“It’s going to be a big challenge, I think, all over the pitch, and my main role will be defensively against their top players,” Lyonnais’ Norwegian defender Ingrid Engen said during a virtual interaction.The former Barcelona stalwart added, “So, it’ll need to be a perfect game, and I’ll need to be as prepared as possible for that challenge. I’ve talked about that. I know them well, but I also know it’s very hard to stop them.”Lyonnais midfielder Damaris Egurrola stressed the importance of midfield in determining the day’s outcome.“It’s going to be very interesting. They also have been playing together for a long time, so they make a lot of easy passes, just know where they’re gonna find that player,” Egurrola said during the interaction.“But I think we have also our potential to just keep the position, and I know we’re capable of doing that. So, I think it’ll be key in this final to dominate the midfield, for sure.”The Wendy Renard-led French team has won five of their six Champions League matches this season and, under Giráldez, the ‘Les Fenottes’ have combined aggressive pressing with positional control, making them difficult to contain.In another sub plot, it will be a homecoming for the Norwegian players in both teams – star Ada Hegerberg and Engen for Lyonnais, and Barcelona’s Caroline Graham Hansen.“We are so happy to be able to play a final in our country and in a stadium where we are so familiar. I will have a lot of friends and family there, so it will definitely be a very special occasion,” said Engen.Only Saturday will reveal which team gets to make the occasion more special than the other.
Article Summary: Barcelona and Olympique Lyonnais face off in the UEFA Women's Champions League final in Oslo on Saturday. It will be the third sequel to the iconic clash between two giants of Europe. The French heavyweights will look to add their ninth European crown, having already ended Arsenal's title defence.

Article Title: The Kerala connect behind Diamond Harbour’s ISL flight
Article Text:
Jobby Justin

KOCHI: When Joby Justin landed in Kolkata in 2017, football greeted him at every nook and corner. It flowed through tea stalls, sparked animated debates between strangers, and echoed through packed stadium galleries. With time, the Kerala-born footballer would get exposed to the city’s passion for the sport, which was unlike anything he had experienced before.Nearly a decade later, Kolkata has turned Justin into a hardened professional. And last Sunday was the most defining moment of his career. Diamond Harbour FC, a club established in 2020 and captained by Justin, got promoted to the Indian Super League after climbing to the summit of Indian football’s second tier: the IFL.“Really proud of how things have panned out for us in this Indian Football League (IFL) season,” the 32-year-old tells TOI. “To think that this club was formed just six years ago makes this achievement even more satisfying.”Justin first represented East Bengal from 2017 to 2019, before moving to Mohun Bagan between 2019 and 2022. After a brief stint at Chennayin FC, he joined Diamond Harbour FC in 2023.“Playing professional football in Kolkata grooms you,” he says.“It helps you soak in the pressure of playing big derbies in front of passionate fans.”Over time, the city would become more familiar to him.“I can speak Bangla, though not fluently,” Justin says. “I work at the Accountant General Office near Eden Gardens. Coming here was never a cultural shock for me. Kolkata is like a home away from home. People here have been very welcoming.”At Diamond Harbour, Justin would become part of a footballing revolution masterminded by manager Kibu Vicuna, whom players call “the boss.”“He rallied and identified 40 to 50 players, groomed them and made them tactically aware of the finer nuances of the game. Our biggest strength has been our bench strength.”Under the Spaniard, Diamond Harbour embraced an aggressive brand of football. The team lined up in a fluid 4-3-3 system that allowed players freedom to express themselves while maintaining tactical discipline.“The coach gave us the freedom to be more fluid in our play. The pressing style of football worked in our favour,” the right winger explains.This relentless pressing game became the identity of a team that consistently overwhelmed opponents.At the apex of the pyramid stood Justin, whose impact extended beyond scoring goals. Leading the squad as a centre forward, he emerged as the team’s chief creator, while bringing experience and leadership to an otherwise youthful squad.The defining trait was their refusal to surrender, even in the face of adversity.The clash against Dempo SC perfectly captured that spirit.Diamond Harbour needed just a point to secure the IFL crown. Yet, nerves crept in when Marcus Joseph handed the Goan side the lead. Lesser teams might have crumbled under the pressure. Diamond Harbour responded with composure, finding the crucial equaliser in injury time through Hugo Diaz to seal their promotion.“This never-say-die spirit has been one of the biggest reasons for our stellar season,” Justin explains.Ironically, the campaign began in disappointment. Diamond Harbour lost their opening match against Sreenidhi Deccan. But even then, Vicuña’s response revealed an ice-cool approach that would define the season.“He didn’t chide us after that defeat,” Justin recalls. “Instead, he said we played well. He told us it’s a long season ahead and asked us to forget about that game.”The calmness filtered through the squad.After an unforgettable season, the Thiruvananthapuram native longs for something beyond trophies.“It’s been a strenuous season for me,” he says. “After the last league game against Shillong Lajong FC on May 23, I want to go back home and spend time with my family,” Justin adds.He returns not merely as a footballer from Kerala, but as one of the architects behind Indian football’s most compelling tales.
Article Summary: Jobby Justin captained Diamond Harbour FC to promotion to the Indian Super League. The 32-year-old played for East Bengal, Mohun Bagan and Chennayin FC. Diamond Harbour embraced an aggressive brand of football under manager Kibu Vicuna.

Article Title: Pep Guardiola to coach Cristiano Ronaldo? Al-Nassr dream partnership rumors grow after fresh managerial update
Article Text:
Cristiano Ronaldo and Pep Guardiola (Getty Images)

Is Pep Guardiola really going to Al-Nassr?

Why did Jorge Jesus leave Al-Nassr despite winning the League?

Jorge Jesus did not leave Al-Nassr quietly. Days after guiding the club to the Saudi Pro League title, the Portuguese coach confirmed his exit and addressed the growing noise around Pep Guardiola potentially becoming his successor. The timing has only intensified speculation in Saudi Arabia, especially after Guardiola’s confirmed decision to leave Manchester City at the end of the season. Jesus, though, made it clear he views his work at Al-Nassr as one of the toughest achievements of his career, and he believes any manager arriving after him inherits a winning structure already built under pressure and expectation.Pep Guardiola has officially announced he will leave Manchester City at the end of the season, and Al-Nassr moved quickly once that news broke. Reports of a world-record salary offer north of 130 million euros per season circulated widely, prompting his long-term agent, Josep Maria Orobitg, to respond.Speaking to Saudi outlet Okaz, Orobitg confirmed there had been contact but played down the figures. "There was contact a month and a half ago, just contact, without any commitment or written offer. It's not that much money," he said. He also confirmed the Saudi Arabian Football Federation reached out separately, though he suggested neither pursuit is currently close to a deal.“There was also contact with the Saudi Arabian Federation about 15 days ago, but there will be no further contact for the time being. At the moment, none of them have much of a chance of signing Guardiola.”As for Jesus, he was asked whether he would feel proud to be replaced by one of football's most decorated managers. His answer was blunt."Pride [for being replaced by Guardiola]? No... why? He's the one who should be proud to replace me, not me for him," he said.Even so, the possibility of Pep Guardiola coaching Cristiano Ronaldo remains difficult to ignore. For Al-Nassr, replacing a title-winning coach with one of football’s defining managers would signal another aggressive step in Saudi football’s long-term ambition to shift global attention toward the league.Jorge Jesus was direct about his reasons for not extending his stay. He described the Saudi Pro League as physically and mentally exhausting, and said a one-year commitment was always the plan."When I accepted this challenge, when Cristiano Ronaldo and [Jose] Semedo invited me, I knew it would be the most difficult challenge of my coaching career. To win this championship, we had to be much better than our opponents. As I told Cris: 'I'll help you become champion and then I'll go on with my life,'" he said.He had initially been offered a two-year contract but refused. Coaching in Saudi Arabia, he explained, demands too much of the body and mind to stretch beyond a single season. He leaves having done exactly what he came to do.Ronaldo's influence on his decision to join was significant. Jesus said he only agreed to take the project because of the Portuguese captain personally."When I spoke with Cristiano Ronaldo, initially they invited me to sign a two-year contract, but I only wanted to do one year. That's what I always do at the clubs I'm at. It was a very tough championship, you have to make decisions, often putting your body on the line, and it's very tiring. It was a wonderful year, I have to enjoy it somewhere else," Jesus said."He has a very great passion for football. I told him: 'I only accept this project because of you, otherwise I wouldn't come. We're going to win both and you're going to leave here with a title.' That's what happened."
Article Summary: Pep Guardiola has confirmed he will leave Manchester City at the end of the season. Al-Nassr have been linked with a move for Guardiola. Jorge Jesus has left the club despite guiding them to the Saudi Pro League title. Jesus said he would not feel proud to be replaced by Guardiola.

Article Title: "Bring Jungkook back again": Jungkook’s 'Dreamers' goes viral again amid backlash over 2026 FIFA Anthem 'Goals'
Article Text:
Fans online are calling for Jungkook’s return after the 2026 FIFA World Cup anthem “Goals” by Lisa, Anitta and Rema received backlash. Many listeners compared it unfavorably to Jungkook’s 2022 hit “Dreamers,” praising its football spirit and emotional impact. “Bring Jungkook back” quickly trended online as streams and views for “Dreamers” surged again, with fans calling it one of FIFA’s best modern anthems.

Why Jungkook’s “Dreamers” is trending again among FIFA fans

BTS star Jungkook’s FIFA legacy still resonates worldwide

Now, the discussion surrounding the 2026 FIFA World Cup anthem has unexpectedly put Jungkook and his 2022 hit “Dreamers” back in the spotlight. The moment “Goals” by Lisa, Anitta, and Rema dropped, social media was flooded with comparisons. Many fans felt the new track lacked the emotional pull and global football spirit that made “Dreamers” such a memorable World Cup anthem.Within hours, phrases like “Bring Jungkook back” began trending across X and TikTok. Fans revisited the BTS star’s performance from the Qatar World Cup and praised how naturally the song captured unity, excitement, and passion for the sport. For many listeners, “Dreamers” still represents the modern benchmark for a FIFA anthem.The criticism aimed at “Goals” was intense. Several football fans argued that the song focused more on flashy pop aesthetics than the energy and emotion usually associated with the World Cup. That frustration quickly turned into praise for Jungkook’s earlier contribution.One viral post read, “After hearing this nonsense, I apologize to Jungkook. Please, can you bring Jungkook back again? @FIFAWorldCup I apologize to Jungkook.I apologize to Jungkook's fans.”Another fan wrote, “Anyone who heard the new World Cup song will go straight to listening to Dreamers . Seriously, we need an ear cleanse; I feel like I've been musically assaulted by this Goals song—or whatever this is supposed to be.”As reactions spread, streaming numbers for “Dreamers” reportedly surged again. Fans also pointed out that the music video continues to attract fresh comments daily, even years after release. Many described the song as timeless and said it still creates the same excitement associated with football’s biggest stage.Part of the renewed appreciation comes from the story behind Jungkook’s performance itself. During the 2022 FIFA World Cup opening ceremony in Qatar, the BTS vocalist performed alongside Qatari singer Fahad Al Kubaisi in front of millions of viewers worldwide.Later, Jungkook revealed that he had only a few days to prepare the choreography. Despite the short timeline, he reportedly pushed himself to improve the stage performance rather than settling for a simpler setup. That effort clearly left a lasting impression on fans.Now, with discussions around FIFA music heating up again, many listeners believe “Dreamers” succeeded because it felt connected to football itself. Years later, the song still holds emotional value for fans who want World Cup music to feel inspiring rather than just commercially catchy.
Article Summary: The 2026 FIFA World Cup anthem “Goals’ by Lisa, Anitta and Rema received backlash. Many listeners compared it unfavorably to Jungkook’s 2022 hit “Dreamers’ Many listeners praised its football spirit and emotional impact. “Bring Jungkooks back” quickly trended online.

Article Title: Neymar’s girlfriend Bruna Biancardi sparks fresh concern over his mental state amid brutal injury setback ahead of FIFA World Cup
Article Text:
Neymar’s girlfriend Bruna Biancardi sparks fresh concern over his mental state amid brutal injury setback ahead of FIFA World Cup.(Image via Getty Images)

Neymar’s girlfriend, Bruna Biancardi, makes a concerning post about him amid his brutal injuries ahead of 2026 FIFA World Cup



Will Neymar recover before FIFA begins?

Neymar, the 34 year old star player, has sparked panic among millions after he sustained a brutal calf injury and will be sidelined for Santos’ upcoming match.While many are concerned about his ability to play in the FIFA World Cup, his girlfriend Bruna Biancardi’s post about him has raised eyebrows.A few days ago, after months of speculation concerning Neymar’s fitness, he was officially included in Brazil’s final 26-man squad for the 2026 FIFA World Cup by head coach Carlo Ancelotti.This led to his girlfriend, Bruna Biancardi, to make a heartfelt post where she congratulated him for his achievements but also mentioned how she has been “worried” about his mental health.Bruna Biancardi posted a romantic picture of the two with a caption that read as, “I've seen you rise from the frustrations, the attacks, the jokes, the sensational headlines.. and I confess that, in many moments I was really worried about your psychological.”The post added, “But, you never gave up on yourself, nor did we 🙏🏼 (your family, your parents, your sister, your team, your friends) I also saw how Brazil ASKED FOR YOU!”Bruna Biancardi continued, “And it was exciting to see how much people recognize what so many have tried to erase. And that only made me even more sure that your purpose so far has been very well fulfilled and that the story you wrote in football is already beautiful!”While Neymar’s girlfriend, Bruna Biancardi, did not explicitly mention what caused the Brazilian star player mental distress, it has sparked panic among many.Neymar also responded to his girlfriend’s post as, “Te amo ❤️🥺” but fans remain concerned about his mental health, especially since he has sustained a brutal injury now.A few hours ago, as per Brazilian sports network “ge”, Santos head of medical Rodrigo Zogaib opened up about Neymar’s situation as he said, "Neymar has a minor calf injury, an edema…But, according to our planning, his progress will allow him to be fit next week when he will join up with the national team."However, Neymar has stayed away from making any official statements about his injury.
Article Summary: Neymar’s girlfriend, Bruna Biancardi, makes a concerning post about him amid his brutal injuries ahead of 2026 FIFA World Cup. The 34-year-old star player has sparked panic among millions after he sustained a brutal calf injury.

Article Title: Fact check: Did Kylian Mbappé actually gift girlfriend Ester Expósito a $1.2 million diamond necklace for her Cannes appearance?
Article Text:
Did Kylian Mbappé actually gift girlfriend Ester Expósito a $1.2 million diamond necklace for her Cannes appearance?(Image via Getty Images)

Has Kylian Mbappé gifted an expensive necklace to his girlfriend, Ester Expósito, as she turns heads at the Cannes Film Festival?

Is Kylian Mbappé fit to play in the 2026 FIFA World Cup amid his brutal hamstring injury ?

Kylian Mbappé, the French striker and Real Madrid sensation, has had his romance with popular actress Spanish actress Ester Expósito, dominating headlines for the past few weeks.While the two have turned heads with how madly in love with each other they seem to be, Spanish actress Ester Expósito’s recent appearance at the renowned Cannes Film Festival sparked chaos after she was spotted wearing a diamond choker worth a whopping $1.2 million as rumors swirl about Kylian Mbappé gifting it to her on the special occasion.No, there are no reports confirming if the Real Madrid’s star player Kylian Mbappé indeed gifted the expensive necklace to his girlfriend.On the contrary, as per French outlet Gala, Kylian Mbappé’s girlfriend Ester Expósito reportedly wore the jewellery from the established brand, Messika Jewelry, and it is being noted that the brand might have lent the necklace to her for her appearance on the steps of the Palais des Festivals in Cannes.However, neither Ester Expósito nor the French striker Kylian Mbappé has confirmed any speculations as they continue to remain private about their relationship.Interestingly, many expected Kylian Mbappé to accompany his girlfriend Ester Expósito at the prestigious Cannes Film Festival but it seems he is focusing on gearing up for the 2026 FIFA World Cup.Last month, in a game against the Real Betis, Kylian Mbappé sustained a brutal hamstring injury which sidelined him for a few matches.Real Madrid officially confirmed the news in a statement which read as, “Following tests carried out today on our player Kylian Mbappé by the Real Madrid Medical Services, he has been diagnosed with a semitendinosus muscle injury in his left leg.”Even though many expected him to be out for the rest of the season, Kylian Mbappé came back to the field at the match against the Real Oviedo.It seems the Real Madrid star is prepared for the 2026 FIFA World Cup despite his brutal injury.
Article Summary: Kylian Mbappé's girlfriend, Spanish actress Ester Expósito, was spotted wearing a diamond choker worth a whopping $1.2 million at the Cannes Film Festival. There are no reports confirming if the Real Madrid star gifted the expensive necklace to his girlfriend. Neither the actress nor the French striker has confirmed any speculations.

Article Title: Prince William’s latest Taylor Swift wedding comment could make superfan Princess Charlotte’s dream finally come true
Article Text:
Travis Kelce and Taylor Swift; Prince William and Kate Middleton. (Getty Images)

Will Prince William and Kate Middleton attend Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce’s wedding?



Prince William appeared on the UK's Heart Breakfast radio show with hosts Jamie Theakston and Amanda Holden on May 22, where he was directly asked whether an invitation to Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce's rumored July wedding had landed at Kensington Palace. The Prince laughed it off with a "no comment," before adding: "I'm hoping, and I'm sure there might be an invitation around, but we'll see. " Swift and Kelce are reportedly set to marry on July 13 in New York City.Prince William’s interview stood out because it revealed how closely the royal family has followed Swift’s rise over the years. The Prince of Wales was not simply answering a passing celebrity question. He spent several minutes discussing how much his children enjoy Swift’s music, especially Princess Charlotte.“Charlotte, my daughter, and Louis, to be fair, Charlotte, particularly, is obsessed by Taylor Swift,” he said while requesting Swift’s song “Opalite” during the radio segment.That connection has become more public over the past year. William attended Swift’s Eras Tour stop at Wembley Stadium in June 2024 with Prince George and Princess Charlotte. The concert took place one day before his 42nd birthday, and the royal later shared photos from the night, including a backstage selfie featuring Kelce and Swift.During the interview, William also reflected on the scale of the Eras Tour experience itself.“We went to see her on her Eras Tour and it was amazing,” he said. “We were watching from up there, which is quite a long way from where the actual action is happening but the atmosphere was so incredible, you could actually feel the floors shaking when they were all dancing, it was brilliant.”The relationship between William and Swift goes back even further. In 2013, the prince famously joined Swift and Jon Bon Jovi on stage at a charity gala at Kensington Palace for a performance of “Livin’ on a Prayer.” That moment, once viewed as a lighthearted royal surprise, now feels like an early chapter in an unlikely celebrity connection that has lasted more than a decade.Reports continue to circulate that Swift and Kelce could marry in July, though neither has publicly confirmed wedding plans. William’s comments did not settle anything. But his reaction made one thing clear: if an invitation does arrive at Kensington Palace, it probably will not be ignored.
Article Summary: Prince William was asked whether an invitation to Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce's wedding had landed at Kensington Palace. The Prince laughed it off with a "no comment," before adding: "I'm hoping, and I'm sure there might be an invitation around" Swift and Kelce are reportedly set to marry on July 13 in New York City.

Article Title: Donald Trump heaps praise on Giants star Jaxson Dart after surprise MAGA rally appearance in New York
Article Text:
New York Giants quarterback Jaxson Dart appeared with President Trump on Friday during a campaign rally (AP Photos)

What did Donald Trump say about Jaxson Dart at the rally?



Could the rally appearance affect Jaxson Dart’s growing NFL profile?



Jaxson Dart spent most of his previous season trying to convince the New York Giants he could become the face of the franchise. On Thursday night in Suffern, New York, he found himself in a very different spotlight. The young quarterback appeared at a campaign-style rally for Donald Trump , introducing the president before a crowd gathered in support of Republican congressman Mike Lawler. For a player still early in his NFL career, the appearance instantly pushed him beyond football headlines and into a political conversation the Giants likely never expected to manage this offseason.Jaxson Dart opened the event with the confidence of someone already comfortable in front of large crowds. As “Eye of the Tiger” played through the venue, he led supporters in a Giants chant before welcoming Trump to the stage.“Big Blue nation, it's a pleasure to be here,” Dart said. “What an honor, what a privilege it is to be here and, without further ado, I'm grateful, I'm honored, I'm pleasured to introduce the 45th and 47th president of the United States of America, President Donald J. Trump."Trump greeted the quarterback with a handshake and quickly turned him into part of the show."I'm looking at Jaxson,” Trump said, “I’d like to know, is there any woman in the audience that thinks they can tackle that guy? Because I'd like to meet you. I’d like to shake your hand. I don’t know. Jaxson, you think you can play against women okay?...Don’t get involved Jaxson. Don’t answer that question.”The president continued referencing Dart throughout the speech, praising his physical build and repeatedly drawing him into broader political talking points. At one point, while discussing transgender participation in sports, Trump joked with the audience about whether any woman could tackle the Giants quarterback before telling Dart, “Don’t get involved Jaxson. Don’t answer that question.”Cameras never focused on Dart during those remarks, and the quarterback has not publicly identified himself as a visible Trump supporter before this appearance.For the Giants, the timing adds another layer of attention around a quarterback already under pressure entering Year 2. Dart showed flashes during a difficult rookie season, throwing 15 touchdowns against five interceptions while adding nine rushing scores. Even with a 4-13 finish, there were signs the organization may finally have stability at quarterback again after years of uncertainty following Eli Manning’s retirement.Now under new head coach John Harbaugh, the franchise is trying to rebuild credibility quickly. Dart’s appearance with Trump may energize some fans and alienate others, particularly in a league that has spent years navigating political division around players and public figures.The larger question is whether this moment becomes a passing headline or an early sign of Dart embracing a more public political identity. NFL quarterbacks are scrutinized more heavily than almost any athlete in American sports. Every appearance, endorsement and comment gets dissected. Dart learned that this week before he has even played his second season opener.For now, the Giants would probably prefer the conversation return to football before September arrives.
Article Summary: New York Giants quarterback Jaxson Dart appeared with President Trump on Friday during a campaign rally. Trump joked with the audience about whether any woman could tackle the Giants quarterback before telling Dart, "Don't answer that question.” The quarterback has not publicly identified himself as a visible Trump supporter before this appearance.

Article Title: Donna Kelce’s stunning net worth rise highlights how the NFL’s favorite mom became a household celebrity icon
Article Text:
donna kelce net worth 2026 (Getty Images)

What is Donna Kelce's net worth in 2026?

Donna Kelce’s rise from supportive NFL mom to national personality has become one of the league’s more unexpected off-field stories. A few years ago, she was largely known only within football circles as the mother of Travis Kelce and Jason Kelce. Now, she is appearing in commercials, making television appearances, building a strong online following, and becoming part of the broader celebrity culture surrounding the NFL. That visibility has also changed her financial profile.Reports now estimate Donna Kelce’s net worth has climbed past $3 million heading into 2026, driven by endorsement deals and her growing media presence.The numbers tell the story cleanly. In 2023, Celebrity Net Worth pegged her estimated fortune at $1.5 million. Three years later, that figure has reportedly crossed $3 million, a jump that reflects just how much her public profile has grown.Brand deals have been the engine here. Partnerships with State Farm and Campbell's Chunky Soup put her in front of millions of viewers, and more deals could be coming as the 2026 NFL season approaches. These aren't novelty appearances either. Donna Kelce has shown genuine staying power in the endorsement space, which is harder to pull off than it looks.A significant piece of this, obviously, is Travis Kelce's relationship with Taylor Swift. Donna has been careful about how much she shares, offering warmth without specifics. Asked about her sons' partners, she simply said, "My kids seem to befriend and love the very best of society… lucky me." That kind of measured grace has made her more likable, not less interesting.Beyond Travis, the wider Kelce family has built real cultural momentum. Jason's wife Kylie runs her own podcast. The brothers themselves appear regularly outside football. It's a family that has figured out how to stay relevant without overexposing itself, and Donna fits right into that approach.This summer adds another major moment. Travis Kelce and Taylor Swift are expected to marry, with reports pointing to July in New York City. The wedding is expected to be a small affair, but Donna will obviously be there, probably drawing as much media attention as anyone outside the couple themselves.For someone who spent decades largely out of the public eye, the past two years have been a genuine reinvention. And by the look of things, she's only getting started.
Article Summary: Donna Kelce is the mother of NFL players Travis Kelce and Jason Kelce. Her net worth has risen from $1.5 million to $3 million in the past three years. She is appearing in commercials, making television appearances and building a strong online following.

Article Title: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce’s wedding guest reportedly threatens to skip ceremony over controversial plus-one rule
Article Text:
Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce’s rumored wedding plans are reportedly causing tension among guests after one invitee claimed she was denied a plus-one. The anonymous guest admitted she may skip the ceremony because attending alone feels “awkward,” especially while other celebrities can bring partners. The controversy comes as reports also claim Swift is keeping wedding details tightly guarded, even allegedly limiting information shared with Travis Kelce’s father, Ed Kelce.

Taylor Swift wedding guest reportedly upset over plus-one rules

Travis Kelce and Taylor Swift wedding secrecy sparks more controversy

Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce’s rumored wedding plans are creating fresh buzz online, but not every reported guest seems thrilled with the arrangements. A new report claims that one invitee is seriously considering skipping the high-profile ceremony after learning she would not be allowed to bring a plus-one to the star-studded celebration.The reported issue has quickly added another layer of intrigue to what many fans are already calling the celebrity wedding of the year. While the couple has kept most details tightly under wraps, new claims about selective guest rules and internal tensions are fueling even more curiosity around the event.According to reports, Swift and Kelce have chosen to keep their guest list extremely limited for their expected July wedding in New York City. Instead of sending traditional invitations, the couple allegedly contacted guests personally to preserve privacy and avoid leaks surrounding the event.Still, one anonymous guest admitted the restrictions left her uncomfortable about attending alone. She reportedly said, “My invite did not let me bring a plus one,” before adding, “I mean, what am I supposed to do? Go alone? That is so awkward. I don’t think I am going to attend because I don’t want to go by myself and I am not sure I will know too many people there. I mean, sorry, I am not friends with Gigi and Bella Hadid !”The source also pointed out that some attendees were reportedly allowed to bring partners, including Selena Gomez and her husband Benny Blanco. That detail appears to have added frustration to the situation.The guest further explained, “I know Selena Gomez is bringing her husband, Benny Blanco, so she has a plus one, but I am not allowed to have a plus one because I am a single woman. I get it, the venue can probably allow for only so many people, but it’s not the best feeling.”The wedding speculation intensified after another report claimed Swift is being extra careful about who receives sensitive event details. Rumors suggest even Travis Kelce’s father, Ed Kelce, has allegedly been kept away from certain information because of concerns he could accidentally reveal plans publicly.One insider reportedly described the situation by saying, “He’s sort of like a loose cannon. Nobody knows what he’s going to say, so it’s kind of a controversial situation.”Despite the reported drama, excitement around the rumored ceremony remains massive. Fans continue to speculate about celebrity attendees, possible performances, and how the couple plans to balance privacy with worldwide attention. With Swift and Kelce both commanding enormous fan bases, every new wedding rumor instantly becomes headline material.
Article Summary: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce's wedding plans reportedly causing tension among guests. One invitee claims she was denied a plus-one and is considering skipping the ceremony. Reports also claim Swift is keeping wedding details tightly guarded, even allegedly limiting information shared with Kelce’s father, Ed.

Article Title: "The families that Russini and Vrable threw away": NFL insider drama intensifies as Mike Vrabel and Dianna Russini rumors spark fierce debate
Article Text:
The rumored Mike Vrabel and Dianna Russini controversy has sparked major backlash online after NFL personalities discussed the situation publicly. Mark Schlereth urged respect for the families involved, while fans pushed back, accusing the pair of causing their own problems. The debate has divided NFL audiences, with many questioning media silence and accountability surrounding high-profile insiders.

Mike Vrabel and Dianna Russini rumors fuel heated reactions online

NFL fans divided as media personalities respond to Mike Vrabel controversy

The conversation surrounding Mike Vrabel and Dianna Russini took another dramatic turn this week, as social media users revived the allegations surrounding the rumored relationship. What started as online whispers has now turned into a heated debate involving media ethics, privacy and public accountability across NFL circles.The latest wave of attention came after former NFL player and analyst Mark Schlereth addressed the topic cautiously on social media. His comments quickly spread online, pulling fans, critics, and football personalities into a larger argument about how far public discussion should go when personal lives become headline material.NFL personality Tony Farmer shared support for Schlereth’s approach, writing:“Respect to Mark for answering the question head on - Mark understands the NFL and the media so it’s good to hear his perspective.We don’t agree 100% on his approach but at least he has the guts to defend his approach.”Farmer’s post included Schlereth’s earlier statement, where the former Denver Broncos lineman explained why he had mostly avoided publicly discussing the situation.“I’ve talked about it briefly on my podcast... not sure what episode but I’ll put a link with this tweet. I think it’s smarmy... But there are two families involved and out of respect for them I have stayed away from the topic for the most part.”That response may have aimed to calm the conversation, but it had the opposite effect online. Fans immediately split into opposing camps. Some praised Schlereth for showing restraint while others argued that public figures cannot expect privacy once controversy enters the public domain.One reply in particular gained traction quickly.“Shouldn't Dianna Russini and Mike Vrabel have had respect for their families to not cheat and ruin their lives?! Why is it the publics job to "protect" the families that Russini and Vrabel threw away!?!”The emotional reaction reflected a growing frustration among fans who believe sports media often shields insiders and coaches from deeper scrutiny.The controversy has also exposed a larger tension inside sports media. Reporters and analysts frequently cover scandals involving athletes, yet many hesitate when rumors touch powerful insiders or fellow media members. That inconsistency has become a major talking point online.Neither Mike Vrabel nor Dianna Russini has publicly addressed the claims directly. But the silence has only fueled the guessing games, with clips, tweets and reaction videos still buzzing through football communities.For now, the story remains fueled more by public reaction than confirmed details. But in today’s NFL media landscape, perception often moves faster than facts, and fans rarely stay quiet for long.
Article Summary: NFL fans divided as media personalities respond to Mike Vrabel controversy. Mark Schlereth urged respect for families involved, while fans pushed back, accusing the pair of causing their own problems. The debate has divided NFL audiences, with many questioning media silence and accountability surrounding high-profile insiders.

Speculation about a detailed prenup, separate living arrangements, and possible summer wedding locations has only intensified online curiosity.

Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce wedding plans spark family tension

Taylor Swift wedding rumors fuel speculation about nuptials

Rumors around Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce are growing louder as fans try to uncover details about what could become one of the most private celebrity weddings in recent memory. While neither star has officially confirmed wedding plans, fresh reports suggest the couple is taking extraordinary measures to keep every detail hidden.The secrecy has become so intense that even people close to the couple reportedly know very little. From carefully controlled guest communication to strict financial planning, the pair appears determined to avoid the kind of media frenzy that often follows high-profile celebrity weddings.Behind the glamorous headlines, the wedding secrecy is reportedly creating awkward moments within Travis Kelce’s family circle. According to reports, Taylor is personally contacting guests and sharing limited information separately to prevent leaks before the big day.That decision may have been influenced by past incidents involving Travis’ father, Ed Kelce, who previously shared private details about the couple during interviews. Now, reports claim he has been left out of important wedding discussions altogether.Even Jason Kelce recently hinted that firm plans have not been fully shared with family members yet, adding even more mystery around the event.Fans believe the wedding could happen sometime this summer, possibly in Rhode Island or New York. Both locations offer the privacy and exclusivity the couple seems to value right now. For Swift especially, controlling information has become increasingly important after years of constant public attention surrounding her relationships.The couple’s decision is a sign of a rising trend among celebrities who favor intimate celebrations over highly publicized events. In this day and age of social media where it can leak out in seconds, it has become almost impossible to keep a secret about a wedding.And alongside the secrecy, reports of a stern pre-nuptial agreement are also making headlines. Legal experts believe the agreement could be highly detailed due to the massive difference in net worth between the two stars.Swift’s estimated fortune reportedly sits near the multi-billion-dollar range, while Kelce’s wealth is significantly smaller despite his successful NFL career. Experts believe any agreement would likely focus on protecting separate assets while allowing joint business ventures when needed.One claim attracting major attention is the possibility of a creative clause connected to Swift’s songwriting career. According to reports, the agreement may protect her ability to write music inspired by personal experiences.Interestingly, despite owning several luxury properties, the couple reportedly still spends large portions of time living separately. Some fans see it as a smart way to maintain balance and privacy, while others believe relentless paparazzi attention has forced them into a more guarded lifestyle.For now, the mystery continues. And perhaps that is exactly how Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce want it.
Article Summary: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce are reportedly planning an ultra-private wedding with strict secrecy measures. Reports claim guests are receiving limited information, while even Travis’ father Ed Kelce has allegedly been excluded from details due to past leaks. Article Title: Haley Kalil described ex-husband Matt Kalil's p*nis as "two Coke cans" on a livestream — and the law might be on her side
Article Text:
Image - X

Matt Kalil sued his ex-wife, Haley, for "invasion of privacy" after her viral two Coke cans comment



Why Haley Kalil 's free speech defence is likely to win in court



Former NFL lineman Matt Kalil wanted nothing more than a quiet retirement. Instead, his ex-wife went on a Twitch livestream, described his anatomy in Coca-Cola units, and turned him into the most accidentally famous retired offensive lineman in America. He sued her for it. She's almost certainly going to walk free, and the internet has opinions.Matt filed the lawsuit in January 2026, claiming that Haley's "invasive commentary" ruined his attempt to stay out of the public eye after retiring from football. He's seeking a jury trial and damages exceeding $75,000, alleging severe emotional distress, humiliation, and reputational damage, and claiming Haley financially benefited from the surge in attention the comments generated.The kicker that really stings: his current wife, model Keilani Asmus, has been receiving messages that are "increasingly frequent, disturbing, and alarming" ever since the clip went viral. Whatever Haley's intent, the collateral damage was real.For context on who these people are: Matt was the No. 4 pick in the 2012 NFL Draft by the Minnesota Vikings, a former Pro Bowl player who spent seven seasons in the league. Haley is a former Miss Minnesota and Sports Illustrated Swimsuit model turned social media influencer with millions of followers across YouTube, Instagram, and TikTok.They married in 2015, divorced in 2022, and were reportedly on amicable terms until November 2025, when Haley sat down with Twitch streamer Marlon Garcia and decided to get candid.Haley filed a motion to dismiss in January 2026, framing Matt's lawsuit as an attempt to punish her for speaking publicly about her own experience, specifically, a "truthful, autobiographical account of sexual trauma" that she says contributed to the end of their marriage.Her legal team's argument is blunt and effective: she never mentioned Matt by name during the livestream, both of them are public figures, and there is no case law where a woman's truthful account of her own sexual pain is an invasion of someone else's privacy. Minnesota recently passed a law allowing speakers to recover attorneys' fees if forced to endure a lawsuit for exercising free speech rights, and Haley's team says they will seek exactly that. Matt's lawyers counter that a spouse has no right to expose private marital details for profit and that the motion "completely misses the point." But framing consensual intimacy struggles as someone else's private information is a legally difficult argument to make, especially when the person sharing the story is describing their own physical pain. The judge has not yet ruled, but the weight of the legal argument sits firmly with Haley.
Article Summary: Matt Kalil sued his ex-wife, Haley, for "invasion of privacy" after her viral two Coke cans comment. He's seeking a jury trial and damages exceeding $75,000. Minnesota recently passed a law allowing speakers to recover attorneys' fees if forced to endure a lawsuit.
